description: wdrozenia bazy relacyjnej #2 w projekcie - wykonaj zadanie umieszczone w pliku jira2.md
title: wdrozenia bazy relacyjnej #2 w projekcie - wykonaj zadanie umieszczone w pliku jira2.md

criteria.description: File server/db.ts exists and exports `pool` typed as pg.Pool and `db` typed as a Drizzle instance initialised with the schema from shared/schema.ts
criteria.how_to_verify: Read server/db.ts and confirm both `export const pool` and `export const db` are present; `db` is created via drizzle(pool, { schema })

criteria.description: DatabaseStorage in server/databaseStorage.ts implements every method declared in the IStorage interface: getUser, getUserByUsername, createUser, getProject, listProjectsForUser, createProject, updateProject, deleteProject, getProjectState, saveProjectState, saveFile, getFileMeta, getFileBuffer, deleteFile
criteria.how_to_verify: Read server/databaseStorage.ts and confirm the class declaration includes all 14 method signatures matching IStorage; TypeScript `tsc --noEmit` must produce no errors

criteria.description: DatabaseStorage.getProject and listProjectsForUser return Project objects with sharedWith populated from the project_shares table, not hardcoded as []
criteria.how_to_verify: Read the implementations and confirm they query project_shares (via JOIN or separate SELECT) and aggregate userId values into the sharedWith array before returning

criteria.description: DatabaseStorage.saveProjectState updates the state JSONB column in the projects table (not a file), and also updates updatedAt
criteria.how_to_verify: Read saveProjectState in server/databaseStorage.ts; confirm it calls db.update(projects).set({ state, updatedAt: new Date().toISOString() }).where(eq(projects.id, id))

criteria.description: DatabaseStorage.createProject wraps its INSERT inside a db.transaction() call
criteria.how_to_verify: Read createProject in server/databaseStorage.ts and confirm the body uses db.transaction(async (tx) => { ... }) and all inserts use the tx parameter

criteria.description: server/auth.ts no longer imports or references memorystore or MemoryStore; the session store is a connect-pg-simple instance constructed with the shared pg pool
criteria.how_to_verify: Read server/auth.ts; confirm no import from 'memorystore', confirm `new PgStore({ pool, ... createTableIfMissing: true })` is present

criteria.description: server/storage.ts exports DatabaseStorage as the default storage instance; when STORAGE_TYPE=file is set it exports FileStorage instead
criteria.how_to_verify: Read server/storage.ts and confirm the conditional: process.env.STORAGE_TYPE === 'file' ? new FileStorage() : new DatabaseStorage()

criteria.description: TypeScript compilation of the server passes without errors after the changes
criteria.how_to_verify: Run `npx tsc --noEmit` from the project root; exit code must be 0
